title: sclarea aethiopis
intro: Sclarea aethiopis, also known as African or Atlas clary, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Sclarea aethiopis include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Sclarea aethiopis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
